category_title: Distracted students using technology or showing physical disengagement
minimal_context: The student is working on a worksheet during an 80-minute class period.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on the questions on your worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks down at the desk and starts writing on the worksheet without saying anything.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: How is the first question going?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to look at the paper, offering no contribution or verbal response.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What did you put down for your answer?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains completely quiet while looking at the worksheet, making it unclear if they understand the lesson or not.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working on the questions on your worksheet.

STUDENT: (Looks down at the desk and starts writing on the worksheet without saying anything.)

TUTOR: How is the first question going?

STUDENT: (Continues to look at the paper, offering no contribution or verbal response.)

TUTOR: What did you put down for your answer?

STUDENT: (Remains completely quiet while looking at the worksheet, making it unclear if they understand the lesson or not.)
